name: jessegonzalez-skills
description: Agent skills (agentskills.io) for Kubernetes progressive delivery with Argo Rollouts.

plugins.name: argo-rollouts
plugins.description: Author, operate, and troubleshoot Argo Rollouts: canary and blue-green strategies, AnalysisTemplate metric gates, traffic routing (AWS ALB ping-pong, NGINX, SMI, Istio), the kubectl argo rollouts plugin, GitOps with Argo CD, plus PEP 723 self-contained manifest generators.
